smells.label: ESLint Disable
smells.hint: Find another way to handle this rather than disabling the rule. If you are 100% certain this is the best approach, add a comment explaining why using the -- convention: // eslint-disable-next-line rule-name -- reason here

smells.label: LLM Comment
smells.hint: Remove LLM-generated separator comments. They add noise without value.

smells.label: useEffect Overuse
smells.hint: Too many useEffect hooks in one component. Consider extracting logic into custom hooks, using useMemo/useCallback, or restructuring the component.

smells.label: Console Log
smells.hint: Remove console.log before merging. Use a proper logger if runtime logging is needed.

smells.label: TODO Comment
smells.hint: Resolve or file a ticket for TODO comments before merging.

smells.label: Legacy
smells.hint: References to legacy code or patterns — consider migrating or removing.

smells.label: Backwards Compatibility
smells.hint: Backwards-compatibility shims should be temporary. Remove when no longer needed.
